VibeExtract Desktop

Ready
⚠️ Accessibility permission required to read other apps' UI trees.

Pick Mode

Idle
Press ⌘⇧S to start picking

Shortcuts

Start picking (or just press ⌘⇧E)⌘⇧S
Arm if idle, else capture⌘⇧E
Grab larger area (parent)↑
Grab smaller area (child)↓
Add to selection⇧+Click
End pick mode + view resultsEsc

Output

Folder~/Documents/VibeExtract Captures

Status

AX permissionchecking…
Last strategy—

Electron Apps

When you ⌘⇧E on these, VibeExtract can restart them in debug mode for pixel-perfect capture.

MCP Server (for Claude)

Lets Claude drive AX inspection, screenshots, and visual diffing for automated UI replication. Off by default.
Statusoff
URL—
Ready to capture native desktop UI
Press ⌘⇧S to start a pick session.
Then click on any element in any app. ⇧+Click for multi-select. ⌘⇧E to export.
native_ax —
